title: wasm NieRelayClient::connect hangs forever if challenge nonce never arrives
description: wasm/src/client.rs line 72: challenge_rx.await has no timeout. If the relay closes before sending 'challenge', the onclose handler drains the pending map but the challenge oneshot is not in the pending map — it is never resolved. Result: connect() returns a JS Promise that never settles. Fix: add a wasm-compatible timeout around challenge_rx.await, or hook the onclose/onerror to also cancel the challenge channel.
